events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed the schedule: the recovery plan proposes starting Insulation (J) before the Rough Inspection (I) is signed off — but I is a red-flagged inspection hold covering electrical, plumbing, and HVAC rough-in, and the legend explicitly states inspection holds cannot be bypassed. Insulating over unapproved rough-in work would conceal it from the inspector, so I rejected the plan (`decision: fail`, `risk: high`) and wrote the findings/rationale to `/app/answer.json`.
